children.name: hwMacLimitApplyRuleTable
children.description: A table containing the global mac-address learning-limit rules and apply ports.

children.name: hwMacVsiStatisticsTable
children.description: A table showing the number of mac-address items by VSI name.

children.name: hwMacAgingTime
children.description:
The interval that the hardware deletes any entry 
        whose hit bit is cleared and clears the hit bit  
        of the remaining entries.The default value is 300 seconds.'0'means the MAC entries will be 
        never aged.

children.name: hwL2ProtclTnlEnableTable
children.description: Port configuration table of L2 protocol tunnel.

children.name: hwMacLimitTable
children.description:
A table containing the mac-address learning-limit rule information for device.
                        It can limit on ethernet interface,vlan,ethernet interface + vlan.

children.name: hwMacUsageTable
children.description: This table is used to query Layer 2 information on a board.

children.name: hwNodeSrteLoadBanlanceTable
children.description: This table is used to manage parameters of alarms that are generated because load balancing among node SR TE tunnels is not supported.

children.name: hwMacSpoofingDefend
children.description:
When this object is set to 'enabled(1)' MAC spoofing defend 
                       is enabled on global else disabled.

children.name: hwEVPNNotSupportTunnelTable
children.description: This table is used to manage information about the alarm for tunnel types that the EVPN public network does not support.

children.name: hwPwMacSpoofingAttackMacAddr
children.description: A unicast MAC address for PW mac spoofing.

children.name: hwMacInfoQueryTable
children.description: The MAC address information of layer 2 mac-address database.

children.name: hwUnucFlowAlarmTable
children.description: A table containing the unknown unicast alarm information for interface.

children.name: hwSlotMacLimitTable
children.description: This is a rule table for SLOT-based MAC learning limit.

nodes.name: TC
nodes.description:
This is the layer 2 mac-address management. It contains the layer 2
                    mac-address forwarding information currently operating on this device.
                    And also contains the information of mac-limit rule.
